title: Capital Markets (Derivatives Markets Fees) Regulations 2019
text:
NATIONAL COUNCIL FOR
LAW REPORTING'
LIBRARY
SPECIAL ISSUE 627
Kenya Gazette Supplement No. 131 12th July, 2019
(Legislative Supplement No. 40)
LEGAL NOTICE No. 127
THE CAPITAL MARKETS ACT
(Cap. 485A)
IN EXERCISE of the powers conferred by section 12 (1) (p) of
the Capital Markets Act, the Cabinet Secretary to the National Treasury
and Planning makes the following Regulations—
THE CAPITAL MARKETS (DERIVATIVES MARKETS) (FEES)
REGULATIONS, 2019
1. These Regulations may be cited as the Capital Markets Citation.
(Derivatives Markets) (Fees) Regulations, 2019.
2. The fees charged for exchange traded derivatives Fees.
transactions on a derivatives exchange shall be as specified in the
Schedule.

HENRY K. ROTICH,
Cabinet Secretary to the National Treasury and Planning.
